title: carlina vulgaris var. rigida
intro: Carlina vulgaris var. rigida, also known as the stiff globe thistle or rigida thistle, is a variety of the Carlina vulgaris plant, a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory conditions, due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Carlina vulgaris var. rigida include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
